src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate the import statement from the Java EE javax.annotation package to the Jakarta EE jakarta.annotation package.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The javax.annotation package was removed in Java 11 and is not available in Java 17; using it causes a compilation error (package not found).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.annotation does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate javax.annotation import to jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using it causes a ClassNotFoundException or compile error in Spring Boot 3 environments.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate Hibernate5 Jackson module to the Jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ dependencies.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class com.fasterxml.jackson.datatype.hibernate5.Hibernate5Module is removed in newer versions of jackson-datatype-hibernate5 in favor of the jakarta package; using the old class causes a compile error (class not found).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated setLabels method with setLabelFilter to align with newer Spring Boot Liquibase integration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The setLabels method is deprecated or removed in newer Spring Boot versions; using it may cause compilation errors or runtime warnings depending on the exact version, but primarily this is an API modernization.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 6 API changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is removed in Spring Security 6; extending it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to comply with Spring Security 6 API changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity configuration from fluent API with .and() to lambda-based DSL required by Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The old fluent API methods (e.g., authorizeRequests, csrf) are removed or changed in Spring Security 6; the old code fails to compile.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace antMatchers with requestMatchers to comply with Spring Security 6 API changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: antMatchers is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace custom JWT configurer with standard OAuth2 Resource Server JWT configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The custom JWTConfigurer integration pattern is incompatible with the new SecurityFilterChain structure and Spring Security 6's OAuth2 resource server support.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace custom SecurityProblemSupport with standard BearerTokenAuthenticationEntryPoint and BearerTokenAccessDeniedHandler.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The custom problem support integration is removed in favor of standard OAuth2 exception handling in Spring Security 6.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove WebSecurity configuration for ignoring static resources as it is handled differently or removed in the new structure.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The configure(WebSecurity) method is no longer used in the SecurityFilterChain bean pattern.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update imports to reflect new Spring Security 6 and JHipster 8 dependencies.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Old imports (WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter, EnableGlobalMethodSecurity, etc.) are removed in Spring Security 6, causing compile errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.servlet does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update CORS configuration to support allowed origin patterns, which is necessary for wildcard origins in newer Spring Security versions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Runtime error or security misconfiguration: Spring Security 6+ deprecates/removes setAllowedOrigins for wildcards, requiring setAllowedOriginPatterns.
